# Architecture Overview

> Generated by `spec-gen analyze` on 2026-04-24.
> Re-run `spec-gen analyze` to refresh.

## Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Files | 7 |
| Module clusters | 2 |
| Dependency edges | 0 |

## Module Clusters

Clusters are groups of tightly coupled files detected by static dependency analysis.

| Cluster | Role | Files | Depends on |
|---------|------|-------|------------|
| **bridge** | `API layer` | 4 | — |
| **(root)** | `internal` | 3 | — |

### Key files per cluster

**bridge** (`API layer`)
- `bridge/harvester.py`

## Entry Points

Functions with no internal callers — the public-facing roots of the codebase.

- `main` — `/Users/laurent/Projets/NoteCast/bridge/harvester.py` (Python)

nodes.name: get_client
nodes.docstring: Creates a client using notebooklm-py's supported auth precedence:

nodes.name: rename_notebook
nodes.signature: @app.patch("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/rename") async def rename_notebook(notebook_id: str, req: NotebookRenameReq)

nodes.name: add_source_url
nodes.signature: @app.post("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/sources/url") async def add_source_url(notebook_id: str, req: SourceAddUrlReq)

nodes.name: add_source_youtube
nodes.signature: @app.post("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/sources/youtube") async def add_source_youtube(notebook_id: str, req: SourceAddYoutubeReq)

nodes.name: add_source_text
nodes.signature: @app.post("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/sources/text") async def add_source_text(notebook_id: str, req: SourceAddTextReq)

nodes.name: add_source_file
nodes.signature: @app.post("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/sources/file") async def add_source_file( notebook_id: str, upload: UploadFile = File(...), mime_type: Optional[str] = Form(None), )

nodes.name: get_source_fulltext
nodes.signature: @app.get("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/sources/{source_id}/fulltext") async def get_source_fulltext(notebook_id: str, source_id: str)

nodes.name: get_source_guide
nodes.signature: @app.get("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/sources/{source_id}/guide") async def get_source_guide(notebook_id: str, source_id: str)

nodes.name: delete_source
nodes.signature: @app.delete("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/sources/{source_id}") async def delete_source(notebook_id: str, source_id: str)

nodes.name: chat_ask
nodes.signature: @app.post("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/chat/ask") async def chat_ask(notebook_id: str, req: ChatAskReq)

nodes.name: list_artifacts
nodes.signature: @app.get("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/artifacts") async def list_artifacts(notebook_id: str, type: Optional[str] = None)

nodes.name: generate_artifact
nodes.signature: @app.post("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/artifacts/generate") async def generate_artifact(notebook_id: str, req: ArtifactGenerateReq)

nodes.name: poll_task
nodes.signature: @app.get("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/artifacts/tasks/{task_id}") async def poll_task(notebook_id: str, task_id: str, wait: bool = False)

nodes.name: download_artifact
nodes.signature: @app.get("/v1/notebooks/{notebook_id}/artifacts/download") async def download_artifact( notebook_id: str, type: Literal[ "audio", "video", "infographic", "slide_deck", "report", "mind_map", "data_table", "quiz", "flashcards", ], artifact_id: Optional[str] = None, output_format: Optional[Literal["jso
